title: stelis divaricans
intro: Stelis divaricans, also known as the "tree orchid," is a type of orchid plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Stelis divaricans are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Stelis divaricans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and promote relaxation.
